item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-01)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41220 Trending skills: 16764 Hot skills: 2655 Top All Time: find-skills (364847) Top Trending: sleek-design-mobile-apps (13236) Top Hot: text-optimizer (84)

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#49): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 19188 Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): text-optimizer
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 84 Source: kochetkov-ma/claude-brewcode Description: Optimizes text, prompts, and documentation for LLM token efficiency. Applies 41 research-backed rules across 6 categories: Claude behavior, token efficiency, structure, reference integrity, perception, and LLM comprehension. Use when optimizing prompts, reducing tokens, compressing verbose docs, or improving LLM instruction quality.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): monitoring-observability
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 54 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Set up monitoring, logging, and observability for applications and infrastructure. Use when implementing health checks, metrics collection, log aggregation, or alerting systems. Handles Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, Datadog, and monitoring best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): state-management
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 54 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement state management patterns for frontend applications. Use when managing global state, handling complex data flows, or coordinating state across components. Handles React Context, Redux, Zustand, Recoil, and state management best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): genkit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 53 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build production-ready AI workflows using Firebase Genkit. Use when creating flows, tool-calling agents, RAG pipelines, multi-agent systems, or deploying AI to Firebase/Cloud Run. Supports TypeScript, Go, and Python with Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, and Vertex AI plugins.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): database-schema-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 53 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and optimize database schemas for SQL and NoSQL databases. Use when creating new databases, designing tables, defining relationships, indexing strategies, or database migrations. Handles PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, normalization, and performance optimization.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): api-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 54 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs following best practices. Use when creating new APIs, refactoring existing endpoints, or documenting API specifications. Handles OpenAPI, REST, GraphQL, versioning.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#47): swarm-planner
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 1359 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: [EXPLICIT INVOCATION ONLY] Creates dependency-aware implementation plans optimized for parallel multi-agent execution.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#48): agent browser
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 1359 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#49): codex-subagent
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 1359 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Spawn Codex subagents via background shell to offload context-heavy work. Use for: deep research (3+ searches), codebase exploration (8+ files), multi-step workflows, exploratory tasks, long-running operations, documentation generation, or any other task where the intermediate steps will use large numbers of tokens.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#50): openai-docs-skill
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 1358 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Query the OpenAI developer documentation via the OpenAI Docs MCP server using CLI (curl/jq). Use whenever a task involves the OpenAI API (Responses, Chat Completions, Realtime, etc.), OpenAI SDKs, ChatGPT Apps SDK, Codex, MCP integrations, endpoint schemas, parameters, limits, or migrations and you need up-to-date official guidance.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (1 → 2): memory-optimize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #1 Current rank: #2 Delta: -1 Installs: 80 (prev 62) Source: kochetkov-ma/claude-brewcode Description: Optimizes Claude Code memory files in 4 interactive steps: removes duplicates, migrates rules to CLAUDE.md/rules files, compresses remaining entries, validates with cleanup. Typical reduction: 30-50% on token count.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (10 → 14): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #14 Delta: -4 Installs: 54 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (13 → 17): task-estimation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #13 Current rank: #17 Delta: -4 Installs: 53 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Estimate software development tasks accurately using various techniques. Use when planning sprints, roadmaps, or project timelines. Handles story points, t-shirt sizing, planning poker, and estimation best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (14 → 49): security-best-practices
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #14 Current rank: #49 Delta: -35 Installs: 53 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement security best practices for web applications and infrastructure. Use when securing APIs, preventing common vulnerabilities, or implementing security policies. Handles HTTPS, CORS, XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, rate limiting, and OWASP Top 10.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (15 → 19): pattern-detection
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #15 Current rank: #19 Delta: -4 Installs: 53 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Detect patterns, anomalies, and trends in code and data. Use when identifying code smells, finding security vulnerabilities, or discovering recurring patterns. Handles regex patterns, AST analysis, and statistical anomaly detection.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (4 → 13): pptx-presentation-builder
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #13 Delta: -9 Installs: 54 (prev 54) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build professional PPTX presentations with brand-aligned layouts using structured deck briefs and validation steps for pitch, roadmap, and product decks.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (5 → 7): ralph
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #7 Delta: -2 Installs: 54 (prev 53) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Self-referential completion loop for AI CLI tools. Re-runs the agent on the same task across turns with fresh context each iteration, until the completion promise is detected or max iterations is reached.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (7 → 33): code-review
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #33 Delta: -26 Installs: 53 (prev 53) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct thorough, constructive code reviews for quality and security. Use when reviewing pull requests, checking code quality, identifying bugs, or auditing security. Handles best practices, SOLID principles, security vulnerabilities, performance analysis, and testing coverage.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (8 → 20): file-organization
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #8 Current rank: #20 Delta: -12 Installs: 53 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Organize project files and folders for maintainability and scalability. Use when structuring new projects, refactoring folder structure, or establishing conventions. Handles project structure, naming conventions, and file organization best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (9 → 18): workflow-automation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #18 Delta: -9 Installs: 53 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Automate repetitive development tasks and workflows. Use when creating build scripts, automating deployments, or setting up development workflows. Handles npm scripts, Makefile, GitHub Actions workflows, and task automation.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (12 → 8): pollinations-ai
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #12 Current rank: #8 Delta: +4 Installs: 54 (prev 52) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate and save images using Pollinations.ai's free, open-source API. No signup required. Supports URL-based generation, custom parameters (width, height, model, seed), and automatic file saving. Perfect for quick prototypes, marketing assets, and creative workflows.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (24 → 4): frontend-design-system
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #24 Current rank: #4 Delta: +20 Installs: 55 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce production-grade UI designs using clear design tokens, layout rules, motion guidance, and accessibility checks for consistent, scalable frontend development.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (26 → 6): performance-optimization
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #26 Current rank: #6 Delta: +20 Installs: 54 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Optimize application performance for speed, efficiency, and scalability. Use when improving page load times, reducing bundle size, optimizing database queries, or fixing performance bottlenecks. Handles React optimization, lazy loading, caching, code splitting, and profiling.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (40 → 10): changelog-maintenance
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #40 Current rank: #10 Delta: +30 Installs: 54 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Maintain a clear and informative changelog for software releases. Use when documenting version changes, tracking features, or communicating updates to users. Handles semantic versioning, changelog formats, and release notes.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (42 → 3): code-refactoring
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #42 Current rank: #3 Delta: +39 Installs: 55 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Simplify and refactor code while preserving behavior, improving clarity, and reducing complexity. Use when simplifying complex code, removing duplication, or applying design patterns. Handles Extract Method, DRY principle, SOLID principles, behavior validation, and refactoring patterns.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (44 → 11): copilot-coding-agent
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #44 Current rank: #11 Delta: +33 Installs: 54 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: GitHub Copilot Coding Agent 자동화. 이슈에 ai-copilot 라벨 부착 → GitHub Actions가 GraphQL로 Copilot에 자동 할당 → Copilot이 Draft PR 생성. 원클릭 이슈-to-PR 파이프라인.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (47 → 12): bmad-orchestrator
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #47 Current rank: #12 Delta: +35 Installs: 54 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Orchestrates BMAD workflows for structured AI-driven development. Routes work across Analysis, Planning, Solutioning, and Implementation phases.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (6 → 5): technical-writing
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #5 Delta: +1 Installs: 54 (prev 53) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear, comprehensive technical documentation. Use when creating specs, architecture docs, runbooks, or API documentation. Handles technical specifications, system design docs, operational guides, and developer documentation with industry best practices.

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (16 → 19): azure-cost-optimization
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #16 Current rank: #19 Delta: -3 Installs: 3451 (prev 3566) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Identify and quantify cost savings across Azure subscriptions by analyzing actual costs, utilization metrics, and generating actionable optimization recommendations. USE FOR: optimize Azure costs, reduce Azure spending, reduce Azure expenses, analyze Azure costs, find cost savings, generate cost optimization report, find orphaned resources, rightsize VMs, cost analysis, reduce waste, Azure spending analysis, find unused resources, optimize Redis costs. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), general Azure diagnostics (use azure-diagnostics), security issues (use azure-security)

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (2 → 3): ai-video-generation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #2 Current rank: #3 Delta: -1 Installs: 10249 (prev 11541) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate AI videos with Google Veo, Seedance, Wan, Grok and 40+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Veo 3.1, Veo 3, Seedance 1.5 Pro, Wan 2.5, Grok Imagine Video, OmniHuman, Fabric, HunyuanVideo. Capabilities: text-to-video, image-to-video, lipsync, avatar animation, video upscaling, foley sound. Use for: social media videos, marketing content, explainer videos, product demos, AI avatars. Triggers: video generation, ai video, text to video, image to video, veo, animate image, video from image, ai animation, video generator, generate video, t2v, i2v, ai video maker, create video with ai, runway alternative, pika alternative, sora alternative, kling alternative

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (3 → 4): nano-banana-2
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #4 Delta: -1 Installs: 10207 (prev 11504) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana 2) via inference.sh CLI. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input (up to 14 images), Google Search grounding. Triggers: nano banana 2, nanobanana 2, gemini 3.1 flash image, gemini 3 1 flash image preview, google image generation

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (4 → 5): ai-image-generation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #5 Delta: -1 Installs: 10163 (prev 11432) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA, Gemini 3 Pro Image, Grok Imagine, Seedream 4.5, Reve, ImagineArt. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, LoRA, image editing, upscaling, text rendering. Use for: AI art, product mockups, concept art, social media graphics, marketing visuals, illustrations. Triggers: flux, image generation, ai image, text to image, stable diffusion, generate image, ai art, midjourney alternative, dall-e alternative, text2img, t2i, image generator, ai picture, create image with ai, generative ai, ai illustration, grok image, gemini image

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (6 → 8): twitter-automation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #8 Delta: -2 Installs: 10078 (prev 11403) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. Apps: x/post-tweet, x/post-create (with media), x/post-like, x/post-retweet, x/dm-send, x/user-follow. Capabilities: post tweets, schedule content, like posts, retweet, send DMs, follow users, get profiles. Use for: social media automation, content scheduling, engagement bots, audience growth, X API. Triggers: twitter api, x api, tweet automation, post to twitter, twitter bot, social media automation, x automation, tweet scheduler, twitter integration, post tweet, twitter post, x post, send tweet

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (22 → 18): azure-resource-lookup
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #22 Current rank: #18 Delta: +4 Installs: 3451 (prev 3562) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: List, find, and show Azure resources. Answers "list my VMs", "show my storage accounts", "list websites", "find container apps", "what resources do I have", and similar queries for any Azure resource type. USE FOR: list resources, list virtual machines, list VMs, list storage accounts, list websites, list web apps, list container apps, show resources, find resources, what resources do I have, list resources in resource group, list resources in subscription, find resources by tag, find orphaned resources, resource inventory, count resources by type, cross-subscription resource query, Azure Resource Graph, resource discovery, list container registries, list SQL servers, list Key Vaults, show resource groups, list app services, find resources across subscriptions, find unattached disks, tag analysis. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), creating or modifying resources, cost optimization (use azure-cost-optimization), writing application code, non-Azure clouds.

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (23 → 20): azure-resource-visualizer
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #23 Current rank: #20 Delta: +3 Installs: 3450 (prev 3562) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Analyze Azure resource groups and generate detailed Mermaid architecture diagrams showing the relationships between individual resources. USE FOR: create architecture diagram, visualize Azure resources, show resource relationships, generate Mermaid diagram, analyze resource group, diagram my resources, architecture visualization, resource topology, map Azure infrastructure DO NOT USE FOR: creating/modifying resources (use azure-deploy), security scanning (use azure-security), performance troubleshooting (use azure-diagnostics), code generation (use relevant service skill)

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (5 → 2): agent-browser
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #2 Delta: +3 Installs: 10271 (prev 11423) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Browser automation for AI agents via inference.sh. Navigate web pages, interact with elements using @e refs, take screenshots, record video. Capabilities: web scraping, form filling, clicking, typing, drag-drop, file upload, JavaScript execution. Use for: web automation, data extraction, testing, agent browsing, research. Triggers: browser, web automation, scrape, navigate, click, fill form, screenshot, browse web, playwright, headless browser, web agent, surf internet, record video

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (7 → 6): remotion-render
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #6 Delta: +1 Installs: 10143 (prev 11267) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4. Supports all Remotion APIs: useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, spring, interpolate, AbsoluteFill, Sequence. Configurable resolution, FPS, duration, codec. Use for: programmatic video generation, animated graphics, motion design, data-driven videos, React animations to video. Triggers: remotion, render video from code, tsx to video, react video, programmatic video, remotion render, code to video, animated video, motion graphics code, react animation video

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (8 → 7): agent-tools
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #8 Current rank: #7 Delta: +1 Installs: 10107 (prev 11244) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok
